questionHtml:
A toy balloon floats at the end of a string. A wind blows horizontally to the right. The balloon is in translational equilibrium.

What is the free-body diagram of the forces acting on the balloon?

meta.title: A toy balloon floats at the end of a string. A wind blows horizontally to the right. The balloon is in translational equilibrium. What is the free-body diagram of the forces acting
